name: agentx-plugins
description: A curated directory of high-quality plugins for Claude Code, developed and maintained by AgentX.

plugins.name: bot-chat
plugins.description: Bind a Claude Code session to an IM chat room (Matrix / WeChat via AgentX bots): push long-task results to the room on turn end, receive room replies into the session.

plugins.name: bot-notify
plugins.description: Push Claude Code notifications (turn results, human-in-the-loop alerts) to a shared IM chat room via an AgentX bot. Outbound-only, zero LLM tokens, no Node.js.
